Implement the following plan:

# SnapTap Profile Serving Troubleshooting Plan

**Created**: 2026-03-03
**Reference**: Use across devices for debugging over coming days
**Save Location**: Will be saved to repo as `SNAPTAP_TROUBLESHOOTING.md` alongside `SNAPTAP_MIGRATION_PLAN.md`

## Current Issues Reported
1. `snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock` - can't access
2. `snaptap.co.za/sixdoor` - doesn't render correctly
3. `snaptap.co.za/siyanda` - doesn't render correctly
4. `snaptap.me/checkeredblock` - infinite load cycle

## Confirmed Facts
- ✅ Profile directories have `index.html` files
- ✅ SSL certificate for `snaptap.me` is issued
- ✅ Nuxt app running on port 3001 (`snaptap-frontend`)
- ❌ `snaptap.me` nginx config is **missing**
- ❌ `snaptap.co.za.conf` routing is **incorrect** (falls back to API instead of Nuxt)

---

## Root Cause Analysis

### Issue 1: Conflicting Static File Handling (Nginx vs Nuxt)

The current `snaptap.co.za.conf` has a **conflict**:

```nginx
location / {
    root /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/;
    try_files /$uri/index.html /$uri.html @api_slug_fallback;
}
```

**Problem**: Nginx intercepts profile requests and tries to serve static files, but:
- Falls back to ASP.NET API (`@api_slug_fallback` → port 5000) instead of Nuxt
- Doesn't properly serve CSS/JS/images within profile directories
- The Nuxt `profiles.ts` middleware never gets the request

**Expected behavior from migration plan**: All traffic should go to Nuxt on port 3001, which then uses `profiles.ts` to serve static profiles from disk.

### Issue 2: Missing snaptap.me Nginx Configuration

The deployed `nginx/snaptap.co.za.conf` only covers `snaptap.co.za` subdomains. **There is no `snaptap.me.conf`** in the nginx deployment folder.

This explains the infinite load cycle on `snaptap.me/checkeredblock` - requests are either:
- Hitting a default Nginx server block
- Getting caught in a redirect loop
- Not being proxied anywhere

### Issue 3: Asset Path Resolution

Profile directories exist on VPS:
```
/var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/
  ├── ecwid/
  ├── images/
  ├── styles/
  └── mfb/
```

But the current Nginx config doesn't properly serve these nested assets. When `index.html` references `./styles/main.css`, the request for `/checkeredblock/styles/main.css` isn't being handled correctly.

---

## Recommended Fix

### Fix 1: Update snaptap.co.za.conf - Remove Static Serving, Proxy Everything to Nuxt

Replace the conflicting `location /` block with full Nuxt proxying:

```nginx
# Replace the current static file handling:
location / {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3001;
    proxy_http_version 1.1;
    proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
    proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
    proxy_set_header Host $host;
    proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
    proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
}

# Remove @api_slug_fallback - Nuxt handles unknown slugs
```

This lets the Nuxt `profiles.ts` middleware handle static profile serving with proper asset paths.

### Fix 2: Create and Deploy snaptap.me.conf

Create `/etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me`:

```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name snaptap.me www.snaptap.me cards.snaptap.me menu.snaptap.me;
    return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name snaptap.me www.snaptap.me cards.snaptap.me menu.snaptap.me;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.me/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.me/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3001;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
    }
}
```

### Fix 3: Verify Profile Structure

Each profile directory needs an `index.html` file:
```
/var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/index.html  ← Required
/var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/sixdoor/index.html         ← Required
/var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/siyanda/index.html         ← Required
```

---

## Diagnostic Commands to Run on VPS

```bash
# 1. Check if snaptap-frontend is running on port 3001
pm2 status
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3001/

# 2. Check if profiles have index.html
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/sixdoor/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/siyanda/

# 3. Check Nginx configs currently enabled
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/
cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap

# 4. Check if snaptap.me cert exists
ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.me/

# 5. Test Nginx config
sudo nginx -t

# 6. Check Nginx error logs
sudo tail -50 /var/nginx/error.log
sudo tail -50 /var/log/nginx/error.log

# 7. Check PM2 logs for errors
pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 50
```

---

## SSH MCP Server Setup (For Direct VPS Access)

To give me SSH access to investigate directly, set up an SSH MCP server.

**Package**: `@aiondadotcom/mcp-ssh` ([GitHub](https://github.com/AiondaDotCom/mcp-ssh))

### Step 1: Set Up Your SSH Config

First, add your VPS to `~/.ssh/config`:

```
Host snaptap-vps
    HostName 154.66.198.20
    User your-username
    IdentityFile ~/.ssh/your-private-key
```

Test the connection:
```bash
ssh snaptap-vps "echo 'Connection successful'"
```

### Step 2: Configure Claude Code MCP

**Windows**: Edit `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json`
**macOS**: Edit `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`
**Claude Code**: Edit `.claude/mcp.json` in your project or user config

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "mcp-ssh": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@aiondadotcom/mcp-ssh"]
    }
  }
}
```

### Step 3: Restart Claude Code

Restart Claude Code after adding the config. The MCP server reads your `~/.ssh/config` and `~/.ssh/known_hosts` automatically.

### Available Tools Once Connected

I'll be able to use:
- `runRemoteCommand(snaptap-vps, command)` — Run commands on VPS
- `uploadFile()` / `downloadFile()` — Transfer files via SCP
- `checkConnectivity()` — Test connection

### Alternative: Paste Terminal Output

If SSH MCP setup is too complex, run the diagnostic commands and paste output here.

---

## Files to Update

| File | Status | Action |
|------|--------|--------|
| `nginx/snaptap.co.za.conf` | Needs update | Remove static serving, proxy all to Nuxt |
| `nginx/snaptap.me.conf` | Missing | Create new file |
| Profile directories | Check required | Verify `index.html` exists in each |

---

## Verification After Fixes

```bash
# Test profile serving
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock | head -5
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/sixdoor | head -5
curl -sI https://snaptap.me/checkeredblock | head -5

# Test asset loading
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock/styles/main.css | head -5
```

---

## Quick Action Summary

Once SSH MCP is set up, the fixes are:

```bash
# 1. Create snaptap.me nginx config
sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me
# (paste the config from Fix 2 above)

# 2. Enable it
sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# 3. Fix snaptap.co.za config - replace location / block
sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap
# Remove the try_files static serving, use proxy_pass to :3001 for all routes

# 4. Test and reload
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl reload nginx

# 5. Verify
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock
curl -sI https://snaptap.me/checkeredblock
```

---

## VPS Directory Reference

```
/var/www/snaptap/ui/
├── current -> releases/103/ui-build/    # Active release symlink
├── ecosystem.config.cjs                  # PM2 config
├── profiles/                             # Static profile HTML files
│   ├── checkeredblock/index.html
│   ├── sixdoor/index.html
│   ├── siyanda/index.html
│   └── ...
├── releases/                             # Deployed releases
│   └── 103/ui-build/                     # Current active
└── logs/                                 # PM2 logs
```

# SnapTap Profile Serving Troubleshooting Plan

**Created**: 2026-03-03
**Reference**: Use across devices for debugging over coming days
**Related**: See `SNAPTAP_MIGRATION_PLAN.md` for full migration context

## Current Issues Reported

1. `snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock` - can't access
2. `snaptap.co.za/sixdoor` - doesn't render correctly
3. `snaptap.co.za/siyanda` - doesn't render correctly
4. `snaptap.me/checkeredblock` - infinite load cycle

## Architecture Overview

```
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           Nginx (port 80/443)       │
                    │   snaptap.co.za / snaptap.me        │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   │
                    ┌──────────────▼──────────────────────┐
                    │         Nuxt App (port 3001)        │
                    │         snaptap-frontend            │
                    │                                     │
                    │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
                    │  │   profiles.ts middleware    │    │
                    │  │   Serves static profiles    │    │
                    │  │   from disk                 │    │
                    │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   │
                    ┌──────────────▼──────────────────────┐
                    │     /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/   │
                    │                                     │
                    │  checkeredblock/index.html          │
                    │  sixdoor/index.html                 │
                    │  siyanda/index.html                 │
                    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Configuration Files

| File | VPS Location | Description |
|------|--------------|-------------|
| `nginx/snaptap.co.za.conf` | `/etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap` | Main snaptap.co.za domain |
| `nginx/snaptap-me` | `/etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me` | snaptap.me domain |

Both configs proxy all traffic to Nuxt on port 3001. The Nuxt `profiles.ts` middleware handles serving static profile HTML from disk.

---

## Diagnostic Commands

### 1. Check Nuxt App Status

```bash
# Is the app running?
pm2 status

# Check if port 3001 is responding
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3001/

# Check PM2 logs for errors
pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 50
```

### 2. Check Profile Files Exist

```bash
# List profile directories
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/

# Check specific profiles have index.html
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/sixdoor/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/siyanda/

# Verify index.html content
head -20 /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/index.html
```

### 3. Check Nginx Configuration

```bash
# List enabled sites
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# View snaptap.co.za config
cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap

# View snaptap.me config
cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me

# Test nginx config syntax
sudo nginx -t

# Check if snaptap-me is symlinked
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ | grep snaptap
```

### 4. Check SSL Certificates

```bash
# snaptap.co.za cert
ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.co.za/

# snaptap.me cert
ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.me/
```

### 5. Check Nginx Logs

```bash
# Error logs
sudo tail -50 /var/log/nginx/error.log

# Access logs for debugging
sudo tail -50 /var/log/nginx/access.log | grep -E "(checkeredblock|sixdoor|siyanda)"
```

### 6. Test Profile Serving Directly

```bash
# Test via Nuxt directly (bypassing nginx)
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3001/checkeredblock

# Test via nginx (full stack)
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock | head -10
curl -sI https://snaptap.me/checkeredblock | head -10

# Test profile assets
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock/styles/main.css | head -5
```

---

## Common Issues & Fixes

### Issue: snaptap-me config not enabled

**Symptom**: `snaptap.me` returns default nginx page or 404

**Fix**:
```bash
# Create symlink to enable the site
sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# Test and reload
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl reload nginx
```

### Issue: SSL certificate not found for snaptap.me

**Symptom**: SSL errors when accessing `snaptap.me`

**Fix**:
```bash
# Generate certificate with certbot
```

# SnapTap Profile Serving Troubleshooting Plan

**Created**: 2026-03-03
**Reference**: Use across devices for debugging over coming days
**Related**: See `SNAPTAP_MIGRATION_PLAN.md` for full migration context

## Current Issues Reported

1. `snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock` - can't access
2. `snaptap.co.za/sixdoor` - doesn't render correctly
3. `snaptap.co.za/siyanda` - doesn't render correctly
4. `snaptap.me/checkeredblock` - infinite load cycle

## Architecture Overview

```
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           Nginx (port 80/443)       │
                    │   snaptap.co.za / snaptap.me        │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   │
                    ┌──────────────▼──────────────────────┐
                    │         Nuxt App (port 3001)        │
                    │         snaptap-frontend            │
                    │                                     │
                    │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
                    │  │   profiles.ts middleware    │    │
                    │  │   Serves static profiles    │    │
                    │  │   from disk                 │    │
                    │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   │
                    ┌──────────────▼──────────────────────┐
                    │     /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/   │
                    │                                     │
                    │  checkeredblock/index.html          │
                    │  sixdoor/index.html                 │
                    │  siyanda/index.html                 │
                    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Configuration Files

| File | VPS Location | Description |
|------|--------------|-------------|
| `nginx/snaptap.co.za.conf` | `/etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap` | Main snaptap.co.za domain |
| `nginx/snaptap-me` | `/etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me` | snaptap.me domain |

Both configs proxy all traffic to Nuxt on port 3001. The Nuxt `profiles.ts` middleware handles serving static profile HTML from disk.

---

## Diagnostic Commands

### 1. Check Nuxt App Status

```bash
# Is the app running?
pm2 status

# Check if port 3001 is responding
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3001/

# Check PM2 logs for errors
pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 50
```

### 2. Check Profile Files Exist

```bash
# List profile directories
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/

# Check specific profiles have index.html
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/sixdoor/
ls -la /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/siyanda/

# Verify index.html content
head -20 /var/www/snaptap/ui/profiles/checkeredblock/index.html
```

### 3. Check Nginx Configuration

```bash
# List enabled sites
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# View snaptap.co.za config
cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap

# View snaptap.me config
cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me

# Test nginx config syntax
sudo nginx -t

# Check if snaptap-me is symlinked
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ | grep snaptap
```

### 4. Check SSL Certificates

```bash
# snaptap.co.za cert
ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.co.za/

# snaptap.me cert
ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/snaptap.me/
```

### 5. Check Nginx Logs

```bash
# Error logs
sudo tail -50 /var/log/nginx/error.log

# Access logs for debugging
sudo tail -50 /var/log/nginx/access.log | grep -E "(checkeredblock|sixdoor|siyanda)"
```

### 6. Test Profile Serving Directly

```bash
# Test via Nuxt directly (bypassing nginx)
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3001/checkeredblock

# Test via nginx (full stack)
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock | head -10
curl -sI https://snaptap.me/checkeredblock | head -10

# Test profile assets
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock/styles/main.css | head -5
```

---

## Common Issues & Fixes

### Issue: snaptap-me config not enabled

**Symptom**: `snaptap.me` returns default nginx page or 404

**Fix**:
```bash
# Create symlink to enable the site
sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap-me /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# Test and reload
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl reload nginx
```

content.text:
Found the issue! The `PROFILES_DIR` environment variable is wrong.

**ecosystem.config.cjs says:**
```
PROFILES_DIR: '/var/www/snaptap/ui/current/profiles'
```

**But the actual profiles location is:**
```
/var/www/snaptap/ui/current/public/profiles
```

The domain routing middleware checks if a slug is a valid profile directory using `PROFILES_DIR`. Since it's pointing to the wrong path, it can't find the profiles.

**Why localhost worked:** When the Host header is `127.0.0.1`, the domain routing middleware returns early (line 83: `if (!PROFILE_ROOT_DOMAINS.has(host)) return`), bypassing the broken `PROFILES_DIR` check.

**Fix - update PROFILES_DIR on VPS:**

```bash
# Edit the ecosystem config
nano /var/www/snaptap/ui/ecosystem.config.cjs

# Change PROFILES_DIR from:
#   '/var/www/snaptap/ui/current/profiles'
# To:
#   '/var/www/snaptap/ui/current/public/profiles'

# Then restart PM2
pm2 restart snaptap-frontend

# Test
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock/styles/site.css | head -5
curl -sI https://snaptap.co.za/checkeredblock/data.json | head -5
```
